SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is entered into as of this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

1. **Ms. Clara Tan**, NRIC No. S7654321B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: clara.tan@example.sg;

2. **Tech Ventures Pte. Ltd.**, a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN T23LL9999D, having its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #10-00, Singapore 048621;

WHEREAS, Ms. Clara Tan agrees to sell, and Tech Ventures Pte. Ltd. agrees to purchase, 10,000 ordinary shares in the capital of Innovation Hub Ltd. (the "Shares") for a purchase price of SGD 1,500,000 (the "Purchase Price");

The SPA does not serve as a project plan and does not contain project status updates. The parties hereto agree that the Purchase Price shall be paid in full upon completion.

For access to more details, visit https://example.sg/transaction/S7654321B.
